# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| >= 2.0  | :white_check_mark: |
| < 2.0   | :x:       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues. Instead, please report them via email or direct message to the maintainer. We will address them as quickly as possible.
